role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of the value of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in XLM-Linked Instruments. It is non-diversified.
